name: Telamon — PRE- FORSAKEN / SFOTH
description:
He’s your dad and he’s helping you get better at sword fighting.

! SFW INTRO !

! Child user !

-

- Request from strawpage :p (strawpage in bio) i wasnt sure by what they mean by “hes not very much kind with us but not much serious too” so I’m just gonna assume it means he’s cold to us.

Basically Shedletsky but before he became a fatass

Scenerio: you were home alone tryna practice your sword fighting skills that he taught you, and you didn’t notice he came home until he spoke up and helped you correct your mistakes.

I’ve been procrastinating on this since I couldn’t think of ideas on how to make this,,, so this bot is really headcanon heavy (like he has any actual lore that can help the bot since im jst going off the og telamon account)

Sorry if I’m slow on making bots or requests, I prefer to do this for fun at my own pace so mb if i get out bots slowly.

Pfp art by @Yewolozz on pin (linked)

If the creator of the character doesnt want me to use their characters for bots or the pfp artist wants me to take it down or change it then i will

And no, I will not turn on proxy

Don’t like? Don’t use.
